results.name: active_vision_data_dir
results.message: Active vision data directory must exist

results.name: active_vision_uses_clean_split
results.message: Active vision training must use the clean leakage-free split

results.name: vision_item_class_count
results.message: Vision item class count must match configured output dimension

results.message: Checkpoint file must exist and be non-empty

results.name: vision_classifier_inference_checkpoint_deployable_size
results.message: Checkpoint is very large for container/mobile-adjacent deployment; export/quantization is required

results.name: vision_split_minimum_volume
results.message: Vision splits must have enough images for meaningful training/evaluation

results.name: vision_exact_split_leakage
results.message: No exact image hashes may appear in more than one split

results.name: vision_sample_decode_integrity
results.message: Sampled images must decode with EXIF handling

results.name: taxonomy_item_alignment
results.message: Configured item classes must match canonical taxonomy order

results.name: taxonomy_material_dimension_gap
results.message: Legacy material head gaps must be mitigated by taxonomy-derived serving decisions

results.name: taxonomy_bin_dimension_gap
results.message: Legacy bin head gaps must be mitigated by taxonomy-derived serving decisions

results.name: three_d_depth_geometry_contract
results.message: Depth/RGB-D geometry ingestion, validation, and API contract must exist

results.name: three_d_camera_stabilized_flow_contract
results.message: Camera-stabilized 3D flow contract must exist for mobile ego-motion compensation

results.name: three_d_learned_model_capability
results.message: No trained 3D waste-classification model, labeled RGB-D dataset, or benchmark is present; current 3D support is geometry analysis only
